## Success Criteria

### Pass

The POC passes if **all** of the above criteria are met. On pass:
- {{next step — e.g., proceed to full PRD, move to implementation}}

### Fail

The POC fails if **any** criterion is not met. On fail:
- {{next step — e.g., pivot approach, gather more evidence, park the idea}}
